利申一下先
我尊重選擇領養或者買貓嘅巴絲
大家背後一定有自己嘅理由或者原因
而導致去今日嘅決定

我其實本身係諗住領養先
但最後選擇咗另一個方向
我相信大家都會諗倒背後嘅大概因由

至於 我貓貓喺邊度買 我唔敢開名
因為我唔想成為大家另一個爭拗位
我會建議你去做大量大量嘅資料收集
唔好懶 千祈唔好懶

我想大家入嚟係睇貓開心
再返番去日常生活 努力讀書 工作

最後
我想借自己個位奉勸一句
盡可能唔好喺一啲曾經比人列入過黑名單嘅街舖度買寵物
我自己曾經係受害人之一
大家爬多的文
自己要多加小心

Many new kitten owners are surprised to learn that kittens have “baby” teeth, just like we do. These teeth are properly called deciduous teeth, and they are not present at birth. At 2-3 weeks of age, the small incisor teeth appear at the front of the mouth, at around 4 weeks of age the canine teeth (fangs) have emerged, and by 6 weeks of age, the teeth at the back of the mouth (premolars) have emerged. Kittens have a total of 26 deciduous teeth.

The deciduous teeth begin to fall out and are replaced by the permanent adult teeth from 11 to 24 weeks of age. The incisor teeth are the first ones to fall out, between 11 and 16 weeks of age, followed by the canine teeth at 12 to 20 weeks of age, then the premolar teeth at 16-20 weeks of age. Finally, at weeks 20-24, the molar teeth emerge.

小貓會在幾天之內開始吃東西

https://www.animalwised.com/when-do-kittens-start-eating-food-and-drinking-water-on-their-own-2391.html

小貓什麼時候開始吃固體食物？
哺乳小貓持續約9週，而當他們的牙齒開始進來，經過約4週，他們就可以開始吃的食物。我們必須為他們提供適合他們年齡的食物。建議用水稍微潤濕一下，以使其更易於適應咀嚼過程，或者添加一些濕的食物（醬或碎醬）。

從哺乳期到生命結束，貓必須攝取的食物必須由高度易消化的蛋白質，抗氧化劑以及omega 3和omega 6脂肪酸組成。這種飼料必須是高質量的，並且要根據容器上的重量和指導表估算出要提供的數量。但是，根據我們小貓的特徵，獸醫可以告訴我們是否應該多吃或少吃。

用於成年小貓的食物的商業名稱有“小貓”，“成長”等名稱。因此，請仔細閱讀此細節以選擇最適合您的小動物的食物。

如果您願意，可以為這一階段的生活做家常食品，但是我們的獸醫建議您選擇全食，因為要保持所有營養之間的完美平衡非常困難。

漸進式變化
現在您已經知道小貓可以從多大年齡開始單獨進食，如果您嘗試不同的食物以查看哪種最合適，則應該知道必須逐步改變食物。逐漸引入新食物，因為突然的變化會引起腸道營養不良，從而導致腹瀉或嘔吐。

如果他們繼續與母親生活在一起，他們將逐漸停止母乳喂養，因此沒有必要分開他們。同樣，不建議在一定年齡之前移走小貓，因為小貓是與母親和兄弟姐妹一起開始學習該物種的典型行為的。有關更多信息，請參閱我們的文章，內容為何時可以將小貓和小貓分開。

一旦斷奶過程開始，小貓就會本能地去吃一碗食物，否則我們可以用手給它們一些食物來教它們，這樣它們就可以進入常規生活。如果它們與母親同住，建議讓小貓在同一盤上進食，以觀看和模仿。

小貓什麼時候開始自己吃食物和喝水？ -漸進式變化

其他注意事項
通過開始吃更多的固體食物，小貓可能會變得便秘，一種幫助的方法是通過進行溫和的按摩來輕輕刺激腸道。我們將留下一個小的垃圾盤，以便他們在那裡開始滿足他們的需求。

與固體食物，對自己攝入的開始之際，第一內部寄生蟲會給出非常重要的是保持我們的小貓的健康。另一方面，我們必須提供新鮮和乾淨的水。一碗水不要太靠近食物，當然，如果可能的話，也要遠離垃圾箱。

https://www.petplace.com/article/cats/vet-qa-parent/vet-qa/how-long-after-giving-birth-can-the-mother-cat-become-pregnant/


Hi – thanks for your email Alicia. I'm glad you asked this question. Your question was: How long from giving birth to a litter of kittens can the mother cat become pregnant again?

The answer is – cats can get pregnant again immediately. Domestic cats usually reach sexual maturity (puberty) between five to 12 months, at which time they experience their first estrus.

The adult cat is seasonally polyestrus, cycling repeatedly (about every two to three weeks) throughout the breeding season (mid-January to August), unless interrupted by pregnancy or illness. Once they have kittens, they can go right back in this cycle and become pregnant again.

I'd recommend keeping her in while she is nursing and having her spayed as soon as she is done nursing.

Best of luck!

Dr. Debra

replies.msg:
https://www.vetinfo.com/home-remedies-for-sneezing-cat-treatment.html

打噴嚏貓的家庭療法

打噴嚏的貓治療方法可能會根據觸發此症狀的根本原因而有所不同。過敏，鼻竇感染或感冒可能會導致寵物打噴嚏。可以使用抗生素，抗組胺藥或抗炎藥，但是也可以使用一些家庭療法來減少打噴嚏的頻率或完全消除打噴嚏。

鹽水滴鼻劑
如果貓患有過敏，感冒或鼻竇感染，使用一些生理​​鹽水滴鼻劑可以緩解不適。 使用10湯匙鹽和1升水準備溶液。暖起來，把它冷卻一點，適用的解決方案與滴管時，它是不冷不熱。

雞湯
如果您懷疑您的寵物患有普通感冒，那麼雞湯可以很好地緩解症狀。確保湯不熱，因為這可能會刺激貓的喉嚨。溫暖的液體應減少打噴嚏並加速康復。

如果準備湯，請不要使用大蒜或洋蔥，如果要買湯，請確保仔細閱讀標籤。洋蔥和大蒜對貓有毒。

補水
如果寵物受到感冒或感染的影響，則需要保持水分。定期更換水碗。您也可以使用空氣加濕器。

蒸氣浴
只要打噴嚏不是由過敏引起的，蒸汽浴可以有效減少打噴嚏。蒸汽會清除鼻竇並緩解打噴嚏或咳嗽等症狀。將貓放在充滿蒸汽的浴室中，並在其中呆5分鐘。蒸氣浴後，將貓放在溫暖的毛巾中或在更暖的房間的毯子下，以防感冒。

或者，您可以將貓放在潮濕的洗手盆上方幾分鐘，蓋住貓並確保其吸入蒸汽。

紫錐菊
紫錐菊是增強免疫力的免疫系統，可減少過敏並預防感冒或鼻竇炎。紫錐菊可以以液體形式或片劑形式發現。
Echinacea
Echinacea is an immune system booster that may be applied to reduce allergies and to prevent colds or sinusitis. Echinacea can be found in liquid form or as tablets.

脂肪酸補品
就像紫錐花一樣，脂肪酸補充劑可以幫助免疫系統，使貓從感冒或感染中恢復過來。同樣，如果打噴嚏是由過敏引起的，則免疫系統增強劑將減輕打噴嚏和其他呼吸道症狀。

何時使用家庭療法打噴嚏
這些家庭療法可能僅在寵物的基本狀況不嚴重時才有效。如果寵物嚴重過敏，並出現面部和四肢腫脹等症狀，則表明存在強烈的過敏反應，需要注射腎上腺素並進行藥物治療。

此外，如果貓有感染，你申請家庭的補救措施，但貓的狀況沒有改善，就需要參觀的獸醫。不要在家給寵物加藥，也不要使用為人類製造的藥物。對乙酰氨基酚（Tylenol）對貓有毒性，高劑量服用可能致命。

https://www.petmd.com/cat/conditions/reproductive/c_ct_abortion_termination_of_pregnancy

Unintentional and unwanted pregnancy in pets is a common concern, and there are ways to perform a safe pregnancy termination if your cat has become pregnant. If you are considering ending a pregnancy in your cat, it is recommended that you first seek the advice and assistance of a medical professional, so that a full risk and side effects evaluation can be done.

Conversely, it is also important to note that cats can experience spontaneous abortions or miscarriages for a variety of medical reasons. Both situations will be covered here.

Symptoms and Types
If your cat has experienced a spontaneous abortion, the most common thing you may notice is abnormal vaginal bleeding; in some cases an expelled fetus may be found. The most common cause of a spontaneous abortion is fetal death due to a hormonal imbalance.

In the case of a planned abortion, bleeding is the most common symptom following the procedure. You will need to closely monitor your cat so that any side effects or health related issues can be responded to quickly.

Diagnosis
If you suspect that your cat is pregnant, your veterinarian can perform an examination by ultrasound to confirm or rule it out. Confirmation of the presence of a fetus is usually necessary before many health care providers will agree to perform a medical abortion. Doppler-type instruments can also be used to hear a fetus' heartbeat if the pregnancy is far enough along.

Treatment
For owners looking for safe options, either to prevent an unwanted pregnancy or to terminate a possible pregnancy, there are several medical alternatives to consider. To permanently prevent pregnancy in your cat, spaying (ovariohysterectomy) is the best option. For pregnancy termination, these are the most common medical options:

Injectable Estrogens- A medical professional can administer these to prevent a pregnancy from progressing. The estrogen must be injected shortly following copulation to be effective. However, there are several potential side effects to take into consideration, including bone marrow suppression and pyometra (i.e., infection of the uterus).

Oral Estrogens - These are not usually recommended because they are ineffective and may cause pyometra in animals.

Prostaglandin F2 alpha - This is a natural hormone that has been shown to induce a safe abortion for cats when monitored by a health professional. Most side effects are often mild, if present at all. Some of the drug's known side effects include panting, trembling, nausea and diarrhea.

Dexamethasone - This is also a viable option to induce an abortion for pets. The injection is usually followed by side effects, such as panting, excessive drinking (polydispia) and urination (polyuria).

Living and Management
It is important to note that despite the myths surrounding the method, post-coital douches do not effectively terminate an unwanted pregnancy in a cat.

Following either a planned or spontaneous abortion, there can be a great deal of discomfort and/or some vaginal bleeding or abnormal discharge. You will need to carefully observe the behavior of your cat to ensure that more serious problems do not develop as a result
